title: Advanced Tooltips
description: More and better tooltips on items! Fabric port of the Inspecio mod.
body:
![Environment: client](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client-1976d2?style=flat) [![Discord chat](https://img.shields.io/badge/chat%20on-discord-7289DA?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6bTGYFppfz) ![Showcase image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ReviversMC/inspecio-fabric/1.19-fabric/assets/banner.png) **Advanced Tooltips** adds new tooltips to items like shulker boxes, filled maps, fish buckets, armor, food, banner patterns, and more! The mod is also pretty configurable, most parts can be enabled/disabled to your heart's desire! [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
## Configuration The configuration file of is located in `/config/advancedtooltips.json5`. You can also use the command `/advancedtooltips config` to manage settings in-game. For more detailed information about the format of the configuration file, please look at the project's GitHub.
## Wait, isn't this just the Inspecio mod? Well yes, but actually no. 😉 You see, [Inspecio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inspecio) has gone Quilt-only with their 1.19 release, which I don't really think makes sense (at least for now). Until Quilt becomes more established in the modding scene, I wanted to have a Fabric version of Inspecio available, which you can see here. Why have I chosen a different name though? Well, I didn't do so purposefully, but the original author of the mod denied me the right to use its name, so here we are. 🤷‍♂️
